parsed_review.summary: CP00-718 is a descriptor-only, no-write, no-real-data, runtime-closed RP23 finance-integrations bridge pack (RP23.P08.M06.S09-RP23.P09.M03.S22, 150 units, Risk C). Source inspected read-only via Read/Grep/Glob (not summary-only). Pack binding (registry.js:409) and requirements (registry.js:3478) exactly match the baseline: pack_id, risk_class C, unit_count 150, first/last unit IDs, and the deliverable distribution (hermes_evidence 42, claude_review 15, implementation 73, security_audit 8, test 8, ui 4) and micro-title distribution. Coverage/distribution drift is enforced by validators.js and verified by passing tests (model.test.js:64-66). No-write/no-real-data boundaries are enforced in code: FINANCE_INTEGRATIONS_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION (registry.js:426) plus validateDescriptor (validators.js:8) reject any row that is not descriptor-only/runtime-closed, that opens bank/card/WEHAGO/Douzone/tax/DART runtime, or that exposes financial payloads, credentials, permission-decision detail, audit bodies, or real data. Hermes usage is confined to deterministic review packet/receipt shaping (createHermesEvidencePacket sets emits_runtime_receipt:false, writes_product_state:false); no product runtime is embedded. Authority boundary is correctly preserved (claude_is_final_approval:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false), with tests asserting runtime_opening_pack_id CP00-719. command-evidence.json shows all expected validation commands exit 0 (npm test, node --test, *:validate suite, git diff --check); readiness auth-preflight passed with valid JSON stdout (no auth failure / 0-byte / malformed-JSON evidence). The contract projection (contracts/external-integrations-ii-contract.json) lists CP00-718 as latest with validation.valid true and CP694-717 historical. Manifest, construction-inspection, command-evidence, and adjudication consistently report production_ready:false / runtime_ready:false / pending_review with valid_review_receipts:[] and no invalid attempts miscounted as valid - the pack correctly awaits exactly one valid hardened Claude review (this receipt) before advancing to CP00-719. Claude remained a read-only reviewer and asserts no final-approval authority; human final approval for enterprise-trust/runtime opening remains outside this receipt and is not claimed by the pack. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings. This review does not block pack closeout or this CP's goal closeout.
